creator: h2+fbsdports@fsfe.org
text:
Two of my ports don't build with clang...

Please add
   USE_GCC= any
to the following ports:
biology/ugene
biology/seqan

I hope to have time soon, to also update the ports.

Fix: 

add
   USE_GCC= any
to the ports' makefiles.
How-To-Repeat: try to build either 
biology/ugene
biology/seqan
